Annotation

Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us
All measured parameters are within normal limits for this patient’s age and sex. No evidence of renal dysfunction, electrolyte imbalance, or dysglycemia. Lipid profile is within recommended ranges. Urinary microalbumin/creatinine ratio is normal, indicating no significant renal microvascular damage. Overall, laboratory findings are unremarkable and do not indicate acute or chronic pathology at this time.
